system_components.name: 系统组件
system_components.description: 系统架构和组件相关术语

definition.zh-CN: 研究抽象结构和形式的学科，包括数学、逻辑学、统计学等
definition.en: The study of abstract structures and forms, including mathematics, logic, and statistics
definition.ja: 数学、論理学、統計学など、抽象的な構造と形式を研究する学問
definition.ko: 수학, 논리학, 통계학 등 추상적 구조와 형식을 연구하는 학문

examples: 形式化科学为计算机科学提供了理论基础
Formal science provides the theoretical foundation for computer science

definition.zh-CN: 研究数量、结构、变化以及空间等概念的学科
definition.en: The study of quantity, structure, change, and space
definition.ja: 数量、構造、変化、空間などを研究する学問
definition.ko: 수량, 구조, 변화, 공간 등을 연구하는 학문

examples: 数学是形式化科学的核心组成部分
Mathematics is a core component of formal science

definition.zh-CN: 研究推理和论证的学科
definition.en: The study of reasoning and argumentation
definition.ja: 推論と論証を研究する学問

examples: 逻辑学为形式化证明提供了基础
Logic provides the foundation for formal proofs

definition.zh-CN: 收集、分析、解释和展示数据的学科
definition.en: The discipline of collecting, analyzing, interpreting, and presenting data
definition.ja: データの収集、分析、解釈、提示を行う学問
definition.ko: 데이터의 수집, 분석, 해석, 제시를 다루는 학문

examples: 统计学在数据分析中起着关键作用
Statistics plays a key role in data analysis

definition.zh-CN: 研究计算理论和计算的学科
definition.en: The study of computation theory and computing
definition.ja: 計算理論と計算を研究する学問

examples: 计算机科学建立在形式化科学的基础之上
Computer science is built upon the foundation of formal science

definition.zh-CN: 负责系统任务调度的核心组件
definition.en: The core component responsible for system task scheduling
definition.ja: システムタスクのスケジューリングを担当するコアコンポーネント
definition.ko: 시스템 작업 스케줄링을 담당하는 핵심 컴포넌트

examples: 核心调度器优化了任务分配效率
The core scheduler optimizes task allocation efficiency

translations.ja: ネットワークスケジューラ

definition.zh-CN: 负责网络资源调度的组件
definition.en: The component responsible for network resource scheduling
definition.ja: ネットワークリソースのスケジューリングを担当するコンポーネント

examples: 网络调度器管理网络流量的分配
The network scheduler manages network traffic distribution

definition.en: The component that manages system resources
definition.ja: システムリソースを管理するコンポーネント

examples: 资源管理器监控资源使用情况
The resource manager monitors resource usage

definition.zh-CN: 存储待处理任务的数据结构
definition.en: A data structure that stores tasks waiting to be processed
definition.ja: 処理待ちタスクを保存するデータ構造
definition.ko: 처리 대기 작업을 저장하는 데이터 구조

examples: 任务队列确保任务按顺序执行
The task queue ensures tasks are executed in order

definition.zh-CN: 经过严格证明的数学命题
definition.en: A mathematical proposition that has been rigorously proven
definition.ja: 厳密に証明された数学的命題

examples: 勾股定理是几何学中的基本定理
The Pythagorean theorem is a fundamental theorem in geometry

definition.zh-CN: 用于证明定理的辅助命题
definition.en: An auxiliary proposition used to prove a theorem
definition.ja: 定理の証明に使用される補助的な命題

examples: 这个引理在证明主要定理时起着关键作用
This lemma plays a crucial role in proving the main theorem

definition.zh-CN: 验证数学命题真实性的逻辑过程
definition.en: A logical process to verify the truth of a mathematical proposition
definition.ja: 数学的命題の真実性を検証する論理的過程
definition.ko: 수학적 명제의 진위를 검증하는 논리적 과정

examples: 数学证明要求严格的逻辑推导
Mathematical proofs require rigorous logical deduction

definition.zh-CN: 解决问题的明确步骤序列
definition.en: A well-defined sequence of steps to solve a problem
definition.ja: 問題を解決する明確なステップの順序

examples: 排序算法是计算机科学的基础
Sorting algorithms are fundamental to computer science

definition.zh-CN: 组织和存储数据的方式
definition.en: A way of organizing and storing data
definition.ja: データを整理・保存する方法

examples: 选择合适的数据结构可以提高程序效率
Choosing the right data structure can improve program efficiency

definition.en: A measure of algorithm resource consumption
definition.ja: アルゴリズムのリソース消費の尺度

examples: 时间复杂度描述了算法执行时间随输入增长的变化
Time complexity describes how execution time grows with input

definition.zh-CN: 将工作负载分配到多个资源的技术
definition.en: A technique to distribute workload across multiple resources
definition.ja: 複数のリソース間でワークロードを分散する技術
definition.ko: 여러 리소스 간에 작업 부하를 분산하는 기술

examples: 负载均衡提高了系统的可用性和性能
Load balancing improves system availability and performance

definition.en: The time delay in data transmission
definition.ja: データ転送の時間遅延

examples: 低延迟对于实时应用至关重要
Low latency is critical for real-time applications

definition.en: A measure of system processing capacity
definition.ja: システム処理能力の尺度

examples: 高吞吐量意味着系统可以处理更多请求
High throughput means the system can handle more requests
